name: Azalea City Fence
notes: Issues: built on cheap/outdated builder (weebly); very few internal pages (3 — thin site); no contact form found; weak or missing CTA language; no SSL (HTTP only). Rating: POOR (score 84)

review_snippets.name: Erika C.
review_snippets.text: I highly recommend Azalea City Fence! Patrick and his team did an incredible job replacing our deck and fence gate. His communication throughout the entire process was excellent.  He kept us informed every step of the way. The final result went above and beyond our expectations.

review_snippets.name: Laura C.
review_snippets.text: Patrick was a pleasure to work with. Not only was he a super nice guy but he had answers to all my questions and made the entire process stress free. Immaculate work and offers financing if needed. I’ve been seeing more and more of their signs in my neighborhood. Azalea City Fenc

review_snippets.name: Nayarett A.
review_snippets.text: Patrick was amazing from beginning to end. Clearly communicated every step of they way and always responded very quickly. My fence was completed in no time and I have already gotten so many compliments on it!

review_snippets.name: Sam S.
review_snippets.text: I highly recommend Azalea City Fence for anyone looking for a high-quality fence. From my first interaction with Patrick, I felt comfortable using him. Patrick was knowledgeable, professional, and efficient. Once the quote was approved, he was able to provide a reasonable timelin

review_snippets.name: Korey O.
review_snippets.text: Patrick was quick to respond, easy to communicate with and very competitive pricing. He was able squeeze us into his schedule to help us satisfy our home owner insurance before a deadline. His team was quick and did a fantastic job with the fence.
